Travelcards valid in zones 3, 4, 5 or 6

Pay as you go with contactless (card or device) or Oyster is valid 
at all stations within the pay as you go area, except where 
shown. Pay as you go fares vary according to the services used, 
the time of travel and the zones travelled through.
To check your fare, please visit tﬂ.gov.uk/fares/ﬁnd-fares
